easy.label: Easy Mode
easy.description: For younger explorers. Questions use simple addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

towerDescriptions.tower-fractions: Light the tower by solving simple addition facts.
towerDescriptions.tower-integers: Restore the path by solving simple subtraction facts.
towerDescriptions.tower-percent: Power the gears with multiplication facts.
towerDescriptions.tower-algebra: Open the water gate with division facts.
towerDescriptions.tower-geometry: Balance the tower with one-step mixed arithmetic.
towerDescriptions.tower-ratios: Face slightly harder arithmetic while keeping the same basic operations.

difficult.label: Difficult Mode
difficult.description: For Grade 7 explorers. Questions use the regular project topics.

towerDescriptions.tower-fractions: Restore the balance of fractions to remove the ancient curse.
towerDescriptions.tower-integers: Defeat the chaos of positive and negative numbers.
towerDescriptions.tower-percent: Charge the percent crystal before its power fades.
towerDescriptions.tower-algebra: Solve the hidden patterns to unlock the tower's spell.
towerDescriptions.tower-ratios: Rebuild the ratio bridge and restore its ancient rhythm.
